runs.label: Invoice workflow (6-node DAG)
runs.description: A six-node extraction → reconcile → fact-check → format pipeline where braggart providers claim 97–99% but realize ~15%.
runs.proves: Calibration ON filters braggarts; OFF buys lemons and collapses end-to-end success.
runs.headline: obj 1.2359 · lift 0.372

runs.label: Budget bottleneck (greedy busts)
runs.description: A two-node logo → code graph under a tight $1.00 budget: the CP-SAT clearing vs the naive greedy router.
runs.proves: Graph-aware clearing reserves budget for the bottleneck; greedy busts.
runs.headline: obj 1.5375 · lift 0.000

runs.label: Research pipeline (8-node, tight deadline)
runs.description: An eight-node research → extract×3 → reconcile → fact-check → format DAG under a tight deadline, stressing the schedule and the twin risk preflight.
runs.proves: Scheduler + shadow prices + Monte Carlo twin on a dense DAG.
runs.headline: obj 2.8142 · lift 0.249

runs.label: Cold-start calibration (claim-free ON)
runs.description: Brand-new providers with zero observations: calibration ON uses a neutral 0.5 prior; OFF trusts inflated bids.
runs.proves: Cold-start policy: ON is claim-free; OFF buys braggarts.
runs.headline: obj 0.0868 · lift -0.627

runs.label: Quality floor binds
runs.description: A global quality floor excludes low-calibrated providers even when they are cheap.
runs.proves: Global quality floor excludes low-p providers.
runs.headline: obj 1.1984 · lift 0.826

runs.label: Scale stress (14-node DAG)
runs.description: A 14-node workflow with ample budget — stresses solver throughput and schedule depth.
runs.proves: Clears a 14-node DAG within budget and deadline.
runs.headline: obj 1.8172 · lift 0.098

runs.label: Deadline tight (8-node)
runs.description: Research pipeline with a very tight global deadline — makespan pressed to the limit.
runs.proves: Makespan fits within a tight global deadline.
runs.headline: obj 2.8142 · lift 0.249

runs.label: Preflight rejected (under-funded)
runs.description: Same workflow as invoice, but the requester balance is too low — clearing is rejected before settlement.
runs.proves: Preflight blocks settlement when the requester is under-funded.
runs.headline: rejected: PREFLIGHT_FAILED

runs.label: Solver degrade (CP-SAT → greedy)
runs.description: CP-SAT service unreachable — clearing degrades gracefully to greedy+LNS.
runs.proves: Graceful degrade from CP-SAT to greedy+LNS.
runs.headline: degraded → greedy_lns

runs.label: Concurrency cap (tier-1)
runs.description: Two parallel nodes share one provider with concurrency=1 — CP-SAT serializes execution.
runs.headline: obj 0.7932 · lift 0.000

runs.label: Bond capacity (tier-1)
runs.description: Provider bond capacity binds — only one heavy node can lock the limited bond.
runs.headline: obj 2.7837 · lift 0.000
